creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Build of port kdevelop-kd4 fails with the following error:


[...]

/usr/ports/devel/kdevelop-kde4/work/kdevelop-4.4.1/debuggers/gdb/breakpointcontroller.moc:53:51: error: use of undeclared identifier
      'IDebugSession'; did you mean 'IDebugSession'?
        case 0: _t->slotEvent((*reinterpret_cast< IDebugSession::event_t(*)>(_a[1]))); break;
                                                  ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
                                                  IDebugSession
/usr/local/kde4/include/kdevplatform/interfaces/idebugcontroller.h:33:7: note: 'IDebugSession' declared here
class IDebugSession;
      ^
1 error generated.
